subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest how a pack of dogs hath encompassed me round about, and Thou hearest my sighing, my yearning and my cry [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری احاطتنی شرذمه من الکلاب و تسمع ضجیجی و حنینی و صریخی فی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
